items.claim: Cody Durden overachieved in his last fight against Jafel Filho.
items.quote: Cody Durden kind of, you know, he overachieved in his last fight. Wasn't supposed to beat Jafel Filho and looks pretty good.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa has yet to beat a high-quality UFC fighter.
items.quote: Alessandro Costa has yet to beat an actual good UFC fighter.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa is undersized for the flyweight division.
items.quote: He's super undersized for the division.

items.claim: Zachary Reese has a grappling deficiency that can be exploited.
items.quote: I think that he could probably maybe expose the the grappling of Ryan Gandour

items.claim: Farid Basharat is technically sound and efficient with his striking.
items.quote: I think Farid's very efficient with his striking... overall very technical and technically sound fighter.

items.claim: Caeser Almeida has accumulated significant wear and tear on his chin due to his long kickboxing career.
items.quote: after a while that takes a lot of wear and tear uh wear and tear on your chin.

items.claim: Damian Pinas possesses elite athleticism and power for his division.
items.quote: I think this kid is very, very strong. He's very athletic. His power is insane for the division.

items.claim: Luke Riley has a grappling deficiency that can be exploited.
items.quote: kind of has a grappling deficiency that can be exploited in fights

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt fights with a fearful mindset, specifically avoiding engagement to prevent being knocked out.
items.quote: Cody Garbrandt fights scared. It's like he's afraid to be knocked out.

items.claim: Adrian Yanez has more power and is more willing to engage in striking exchanges than Cody Garbrandt.
items.quote: I have to pick Adrian Yanez cuz I feel like he has the more power. I feel like he's less scared to get knocked out.
Nikita Krylov, a little bit more hittable, a little bit defensively irresponsible.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker will have a significant speed advantage over Nikita Krylov due to moving up from lower weight classes.
items.quote: Robert Whittaker, the smaller fighter coming up from 185 and previously 170, should be a lot faster than Nikita Krylov.
